name: @devchitchat/rdbljs
description: Signals-based reactive DOM binding. Plain HTML, no build step, no virtual DOM.

scripts.docs:build:github: cp src/rdbl.js docs/pages/public/assets/rdbl.js && bunx @devchitchat/index97 build docs/pages --out dist --path-prefix /rdbljs/
scripts.docs:build: cp src/rdbl.js docs/pages/public/assets/rdbl.js && bunx @devchitchat/index97 build docs/pages --out dist
scripts.docs:serve: cp src/rdbl.js docs/pages/public/assets/rdbl.js && bunx @devchitchat/index97 build docs/pages --out dist && bunx @devchitchat/index97 serve dist

author: Joey Guerra
